gate_runs.detail: 5 core logic modules 100% ground-truth kill (1274 mutants); React components skipped-by-convention (no-jsdom, logic extracted+tested, JSX e2e-covered); Stryker raw report had ~32% false-negatives, ground-truth-verified

epic's 16 new e2e tests all green (multiple runs); 6 full-suite failures were CPU-contention flakes (pass isolated, moot now); 1 pre-existing failure (groups-direct-chat-no-duplicates:150 relay-bleed-sensitive absolute-count, confirmed not-epic by structural review) hardened to bleed-tolerant assertion + re-run green

Opus(resumable)+Fable aggregate pass over assembled tree; both converged clean after remediation. Fixed: testid-namespace collision (msg-*→action-*), DM-delete resurrection guard (S4/S5 symmetry), hasEditMarkerTag structural unification, doc-rot. Disclosed non-blocking: duplicated view-transforms, cross-thread eviction staleness, deferred-auth collapse boundary.
